raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "exhortation to adopt a contemplative Stoic perspective linking cosmology to personal conduct",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "the universe possesses an intelligible, orderly nature",
    "the individual is a functional part of that whole whose role can be known",
    "alignment between personal action and universal nature is always possible",
    "external forces cannot ultimately prevent such alignment"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally consistent within a teleological, part-whole metaphysics; assumes knowability of cosmic order and direct ethical implications",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "reader seeks reflective guidance for ethical living, accepts nature as normative, and values meditative self-reminders",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "reader interprets claims as empirical cosmology, expects practical techniques for overcoming real constraints, or treats 'nature' as license for any behavior"
}
